# Modal CPU image used for the genome-scale discovery run (driver.py):
modal.Image.debian_slim(python_version="3.11").pip_install(
    "h5py==3.11.0", "pandas==2.2.2", "scipy==1.13.1", "numpy==1.26.4")
# Resources: cpu=8, memory=32768 MB, timeout=7200 s
# Inputs downloaded at runtime from the public S3 bucket (see DATA.md).
